construction.title: 方格紙上畫四邊形
construction.author: Anthony C.M. Or. Education Bureau, Hong Kong.

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, 1, 0]
If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[b ≟ a, 1, 0], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[b ≟ a, 0, 1], 0]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 1, If[c ≟ b, 0, 0]], 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 0, If[c ≟ b, 0, 0.8]], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 0, If[c ≟ b, 1, 0.8]], 0]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 1, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0, 1]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 0]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 1, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 1]]], 0]

element.label: 以相同顏色顯示相等的邊

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[方格紙, !釘板]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, 1, 0]
If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[b ≟ a, 1, 0], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[b ≟ a, 0, 1], 0]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 1, If[c ≟ b, 0, 0]], 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 0, If[c ≟ b, 0, 0.8]], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[c ≟ a, 0, If[c ≟ b, 1, 0.8]], 0]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 1, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0, 1]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 0]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 1, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 1]]], 0]

objColor.dynamicr: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 1, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0, 1]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicg: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 0, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 0]]], 0]
objColor.dynamicb: If[以相同顏色顯示相等的邊, If[d ≟ a, 0, If[d ≟ b, 1, If[d ≟ c, 0.8, 1]]], 0]

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[釘板, !方格紙]

SetValue[Q1, true] SetValue[Q2, false] SetValue[Q3, false] SetValue[Q4, false] SetValue[Q5, false] SetValue[Reset, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,false] SetVisibleInView[D,1,false] SetVisibleInView[B,1,true] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

SetValue[Q2, true] SetValue[Q1, false] SetValue[Q3, false] SetValue[Q4, false] SetValue[Q5, false] SetValue[Reset, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,false] SetVisibleInView[D,1,false] SetVisibleInView[B,1,true] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

SetValue[Q3, true] SetValue[Q2, false] SetValue[Q1, false] SetValue[Q4, false] SetValue[Q5, false] SetValue[Reset, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,false] SetVisibleInView[D,1,false] SetVisibleInView[B,1,false] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

SetValue[Q4, true] SetValue[Q2, false] SetValue[Q3, false] SetValue[Q1, false] SetValue[Q5, false] SetValue[Reset, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,false] SetVisibleInView[D,1,false] SetVisibleInView[B,1,true] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

SetValue[Q5, true] SetValue[Q2, false] SetValue[Q3, false] SetValue[Q4, false] SetValue[Q1, false] SetValue[Reset, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,false] SetVisibleInView[D,1,false] SetVisibleInView[B,1,false] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

SetValue[Reset, true] SetValue[Q2, false] SetValue[Q3, false] SetValue[Q4, false] SetValue[Q5, false] SetValue[Q1, false] SetVisibleInView[C,1,true] SetVisibleInView[D,1,true] SetVisibleInView[B,1,true] SetVisibleInView[A,1,true] SetValue[A, (5,7)] SetValue[B, (9,6)] SetValue[C, (8,4)] SetValue[D, (3,3)] SetValue[F, (5,7)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)]

expression.label: text5
expression.exp: "拖拉 點、 點及 點，在圖中加上三條 直線，與原有的直線組成一個正方形。"

expression.label: text6
expression.exp: "提示： 點擊直線，顯示/隱藏它所穿過的 正方形或長方形"

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[Q1d, true] SetValue[Q1b, false] SetValue[Q1c, false] SetValue[Q1a, false] SetValue[D, (2,5)] SetValue[C, (4,2)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q1b, true] SetValue[Q1a, false] SetValue[Q1c, false] SetValue[Q1d, false] SetValue[D, (5,5)] SetValue[C, (3,7)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q1c, true] SetValue[Q1b, false] SetValue[Q1a, false] SetValue[Q1d, false] SetValue[D, (3,4)] SetValue[C, (5,5)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q1a, true] SetValue[Q1b, false] SetValue[Q1c, false] SetValue[Q1d, false] SetValue[D, (1,4)] SetValue[C, (4,4)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

expression.label: text7
expression.exp:
"拖拉 點、 點及 點，在圖中加上三條 直線，與原有的直線組成一個菱形。
還有其他不同形狀的菱形嗎？"

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[Q2c, true] SetValue[Q2b, false] SetValue[Q2a, false] SetValue[D, (3,6)] SetValue[C, (5,3)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q2b, true] SetValue[Q2a, false] SetValue[Q2c, false] SetValue[D, (4,6)] SetValue[C, (5,3)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q2a, true] SetValue[Q2b, false] SetValue[Q2c, false] SetValue[D, (4,4)] SetValue[C, (6,5)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

expression.label: text8
expression.exp: "拖拉 點及 點，在圖中加上二條直線， 與原有的直線組成一個平行四邊形。"

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[Q3d, true] SetValue[Q3b, false] SetValue[Q3c, false] SetValue[Q3a, false] SetValue[D, (4,7)] SetValue[C, (2,4)] SetValue[B, (5,3)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q3b, true] SetValue[Q3a, false] SetValue[Q3c, false] SetValue[Q3d, false] SetValue[D, (6,4)] SetValue[C, (6,6)] SetValue[B, (3,5)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q3c, true] SetValue[Q3b, false] SetValue[Q3a, false] SetValue[Q3d, false] SetValue[D, (3,3)] SetValue[C, (5,4)] SetValue[B, (6,7)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q3a, true] SetValue[Q3b, false] SetValue[Q3c, false] SetValue[Q3d, false] SetValue[D, (1,3)] SetValue[C, (4,3)] SetValue[B, (6,6)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q4c, true] SetValue[Q4b, false] SetValue[Q4a, false] SetValue[D, (9,2)] SetValue[C, (6,1)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q4b, true] SetValue[Q4a, false] SetValue[Q4c, false] SetValue[D, (6,9)] SetValue[C, (9,6)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q4a, true] SetValue[Q4b, false] SetValue[Q4c, false] SetValue[D, (1,6)] SetValue[C, (1,3)] SetValue[B, C] SetValue[A, C] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

expression.label: text9
expression.exp: "拖拉 點、 點及 點，在圖中加上三條 直線，與原有的直線組成一個長方形。"

ggbscript.onUpdate: SetValue[Q5c, true] SetValue[Q5b, false] SetValue[Q5a, false] SetValue[D, (8,4)] SetValue[C, (6,6)] SetValue[B, (5,4)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q5b, true] SetValue[Q5a, false] SetValue[Q5c, false] SetValue[D, (6,5)] SetValue[C, (4,4)] SetValue[B, (4,1)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

SetValue[Q5a, true] SetValue[Q5b, false] SetValue[Q5c, false] SetValue[D, (9,5)] SetValue[C, (7,5)] SetValue[B, (6,3)] SetValue[A, B] SetValue[F, D] SetValue[A_1, (0,0)] SetValue[A_6, (1,0)] SetValue[o1, false] SetValue[o2, false] SetValue[o3, false] SetValue[o4, false]

expression.label: text10
expression.exp:
"拖拉 點及 點，在圖中加上二條直線， 與原有的直線組成一個梯形。
還有其他不同形狀的梯形嗎？"
